functional_requirements.title: Create Project
functional_requirements.description: Create a new project with name, description, owner_id. Check owner exists. Default status: planning. Record creation time.

functional_requirements.title: Update Project
functional_requirements.description: Update project information: description, owner_id, status, deadline. Check project exists. Record status changes.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Project
functional_requirements.description: Delete a project. Check project exists. Also delete all tasks under the project.

functional_requirements.title: Create Task
functional_requirements.description: Create a task under a project. Specify project_id, title, description, priority, estimated_hours. Check project exists and status is planning or active. Default status: todo. No assignee.

functional_requirements.title: Assign Task
functional_requirements.description: Assign a task to a team member. Check task exists and unassigned or reassign. Check member exists and availability is available. Optionally check skill match. Update assignee_id. Update member availability to busy.

functional_requirements.title: Update Task Status
functional_requirements.description: Update task status. Check task exists. Status flow: todo -> in_progress -> review -> done. Blocked can be set anytime. Record actual_hours when done.

functional_requirements.title: Complete Task
functional_requirements.description: Complete a task. Check task status is review. Update status to done. Record actual_hours. Release member (set availability to available).

functional_requirements.title: Delete Task
functional_requirements.description: Delete a task. Check task exists. If assigned, release member.

functional_requirements.title: List Project Tasks
functional_requirements.description: List tasks of a project. Can filter by status, priority, assignee. Show task details and progress.

functional_requirements.title: Get Member Tasks
functional_requirements.description: Get all tasks of a member. Show current and historical tasks. Calculate hour statistics.

functional_requirements.title: Get Project Progress
functional_requirements.description: Get project progress. Calculate task completion rate, status counts, hour comparison (estimated vs actual), estimated completion time.

functional_requirements.title: Add Member
functional_requirements.description: Add a team member. Check member_id not duplicate.

functional_requirements.title: Update Member Availability
functional_requirements.description: Update member availability. Check member has no in-progress tasks before setting to offline.

non_functional_requirements.description: Data consistency across three data sources must be maintained.
Error handling for invalid project/task/member and status conflicts.

acceptance_criteria.description: Create project with valid owner_id returns success with project_id and status planning.
Create project with invalid owner_id returns failure.
Update project status to active with deadline returns success.
Delete project deletes all associated tasks and returns count.
Create task under active project returns task_id and status todo.
Assign task to available member updates assignee and member status to busy.
Assign task to busy member returns failure with message.
Update task status from todo to in_progress returns success.
Complete task from review status updates to done and releases member.
Delete task releases member if assigned.
List project tasks with status filter returns correct tasks.
Get member tasks returns current and completed tasks with total hours.
Get project progress returns correct completion rate and hour comparison.
Add member with duplicate ID returns failure.
Update member availability to offline fails if member has in-progress tasks.

storage.details: Three independent data sources: members, projects, tasks stored in memory.

glossary.member: A team member with role, skills, and availability.
glossary.project: A project with tasks, owner, and status.
glossary.task: A task within a project with assignee, status, priority, and hours.
glossary.status flow: Task status progression: todo -> in_progress -> review -> done, with blocked as exception.

input_spec.description: Input is a JSON object with command and project_data fields. The command specifies the operation, and project_data contains the parameters.

schema.command: string (one of: create_project, update_project, delete_project, create_task, assign_task, update_task_status, complete_task, delete_task, list_project_tasks, get_member_tasks, get_project_progress, add_member, update_member_availability)
schema.project_data: object containing relevant fields for the command

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields.
